1b:I[41299,["5034","static/chunks/5034-5887c1fdc6f0a5a7.js","1181","static/chunks/1181-540f403fe246ea63.js","6081","static/chunks/6081-6f27fa977dcb5e37.js","1714","static/chunks/1714-406a3872ffaef429.js","3427","static/chunks/app/brands/%5Bslug%5D/page-f71b55525ffd706e.js"],"default"]
1c:T531,Ichinban Kuji is Japan's favourite anime collectibles prize draw with no losers! The set contains 80 raffle tickets and 81* prizes, divided into different prize tiers. The main prizes are usually high-quality, exclusive PVC statues that are only available within these sweepstakes. In addition, there are many smaller prizes such as towels, bags, minifigures, key rings and more.

This set contains:

A - 1x Super Saiyan Gohan Figure 20 cm
B - 1x Super Saiyan Goten Figure 12 cm
C - 2x Cooler / Metal Cool 25 cm Figure (2 styles)
D - 1x Turles Figure 25 cm
E - 1x Super Janemba Figure 25 cm
F - 1x Beerus Figure 23cm
G - 4x Acrylic Stand 15cm (2 styles)
H - 24x Memo Pad 10 cm (6 styles)
I - 18x Tumbler 13 cm (6 styles)
J - 27x Towel 60 or 25 cm (8 styles)
LAST ONE - 1x Last One figure

Notes:

The contents of the Ichiban Kuji sets are not available for purchase and may only be raffled through the sale of the included raffle tickets in your store. Each prize is marked on a poster, which is also included, so that you can always see which prizes are still available in the respective raffle.

*The last ticket purchased from a set wins twice. In addition to the prize drawn, the buyer of the last ticket also receives the so-called 'The Last One' prize, which is usually a rare PVC statue that is only available in this
